carriers.notes: Higher-volume accounts (20k+/week) see dynamic adders up to $8.75 based on June 2025 baseline
Peaking program adds $1.55 – $8.75 per pkg for high-volume shippers (20k+/week)
Applies to Ground Advantage, PM, PM Express, Parcel Select (Commercial & Retail)
No residential or weekend add-ons — flat demand charges only

carriers.peak_surcharges_summary: Parcel Ground: +$0.62–$0.67; Parcel Plus: +$0.62–$1.07; Returns mirror USPS adds
carriers.notes: Applies to all SmartMail Domestic services

carriers.peak_surcharges_summary: Residential & Large Package demand adds; AHS/Large/Over Max surcharges
carriers.notes: Check your account-specific rider for exact rates
Uniform charge across all zones; subject to update

UPS (U.S.): Ground Saver & Ground Residential: $0.40 → $0.60 → $0.40 across the 3 periods

Higher-Volume program (if you exceeded 20k pkgs in any week since Oct 2024): weekly, tiered per-piece surcharges by peaking vs. baseline (up to $8.75 for some tiers). Baseline = June 2025 avg (or late-Aug/Sept if you dropped >20%).
FedEx (U.S.): Additional Handling / Oversize / Unauthorized: Sep 29–Nov 23 → Nov 24–Dec 28 → Dec 29–Jan 18
Express & Ground residential / Ground Economy: Oct 27–Nov 23 → Nov 24–Dec 28 → Dec 29–Jan 18.
Dynamic weekly add-ons by peaking factor (e.g., Ground/Home: $1.55 → $7.50; Express: $2.80 → $8.75). Two-week lag from calc → application weeks.
USPS (Retail & Commercial): Window: Oct 5, 2025–Jan 18, 2026 (temporary holiday price change approved by USPS governors; PRC review noted; USPS confirmed effective Oct 5).
How it works: flat amounts added by zone/weight to PM, PME, USPS Ground Advantage, and Parcel Select (commercial). Examples:
PME: +$1.00 to +$13.00 depending on zone/weight. (Retail adds are slightly higher.)
Amazon Shipping (U.S.): Notes: still no residential or weekend delivery fee add-ons.
DHL eCommerce Solutions (SmartMail): Returns and USPS-handed products (GA/PM) have listed adds mirroring USPS tiers (e.g., GA 26–70 lb: +$3.00 Z1–4 / +$5.50 Z5–8).
OnTrac (LaserShip/OnTrac network): What’s impacted: Residential demand adders, Additional Handling, Large Package, Exceeding Max Limits; plus a Demand Large Package program (criteria-based; e.g., length >72” or cubic size >17,280 in³). Amounts may be account-specific—check your agreement or current surcharge page.
GLS-US (regional carrier): Window & amount: GLS will assess a Peak-Season Surcharge = $1.50 per parcel during its 2025 window (GLS customer notice and accessorials table). Recent comms show Oct 13, 2025–Jan 16, 2026 window.
